titel.label: Titel der Anfrage
titel.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

berichtstyp.label: Berichtstyp
berichtstyp.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

bereich.label: Bereich / Abteilung
bereich.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

zeitraum_von.label: Zeitraum von
zeitraum_von.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

zeitraum_bis.label: Zeitraum bis
zeitraum_bis.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

anforderer_vorname.label: Vorname des Anforderers
anforderer_vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

anforderer_nachname.label: Nachname des Anforderers
anforderer_nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

verantwortlicher_vorname.label: Vorname des Verantwortlichen
verantwortlicher_vorname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

verantwortlicher_nachname.label: Nachname des Verantwortlichen
verantwortlicher_nachname.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

prioritaet.label: Priorität
prioritaet.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as radio button fields in HTML pages.

status.label: Status
status.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

faelligkeitsdatum.label: Fälligkeitsdatum
faelligkeitsdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

kennzahlen.label: Relevante Kennzahlen
kennzahlen.description:
Arbitrary number of selected options out of multiple available ones.

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be a list of keys from this `lookup_data` attribute.

Displayed as multiple checkbox fields in HTML pages.

beschreibung.label: Beschreibung / Anforderungen
beschreibung.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

anhang.label: Anhang
anhang.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/69e9f472b5a446e7391ec863/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).
